message:
feat(parser): add support for relative cursor movement sequences (CUU/CUD/CUF/CUB/CHA)

- Add Action variants for CUU (cursor up), CUD (cursor down), CUF (cursor
  right), CUB (cursor left), and CHA (cursor to absolute column) control
  sequences that were previously unsupported
- Add parser handling to dispatch these sequences from CSI parameter parsing
- Extend differential terminal test harness with handlers for all new sequences
- Add test fixtures: csi_cub_left, csi_cursor_relative_moves, csi_cha_column_absolute
- Update known_mismatches.tsv: remove csi_cub_left (now implemented), document
  CSI S (scroll up) as known unsupported

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
 # id|cols|rows|input_hex|root_cause
-csi_cub_left|10|3|6162631b5b32445a|Parser still emits unsupported CSI cursor-relative movement (CUB) as raw Escape action; differential harness intentionally ignores it for now.
+csi_scroll_up|10|3|41414141410a42424242420a43434343431b5b3153|CSI S (scroll up) is implemented by the reference terminal but currently remains unsupported in the parser/harness baseline.
